summary: References a TOP from anywhere in the project by path, allowing you to use its output without a direct wire connection.

key_params.name: top
key_params.note: Path to the source TOP to reference (absolute or relative)

common_gotchas: If the referenced path is invalid or the target is deleted, the Select silently outputs nothing.
Overusing Selects across many COMPs can obscure data flow — prefer exports or In/Out TOPs for structured designs.
